title: Urostachys intermedius
taxonomy: Urostachys intermedius is classified as a species of mat-forming plant in the family Asparagaceae. Within the plant kingdom, it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, the division Liliopsida. The order Asparagales is also a key classification for this plant. Additionally, the family Asparagaceae is a large and diverse group that includes many species of flowering plants. Urostachys intermedius is further categorized as a member of the genus Urostachys, which is a group of mat-forming plants native to South America.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues.
